AI Project Standard

Public website for the AI Project Standard project. The site currently covers the project baseline and related guidance for professional AI use in technical projects.

Important public sections:
- https://ai-standard.rubennati.at/
- https://ai-standard.rubennati.at/use-cases
- https://ai-standard.rubennati.at/profiles
- https://ai-standard.rubennati.at/docs
- https://ai-standard.rubennati.at/about

Notes:
- The /docs section is a public reader view of repository documentation.
- The /blog page exists but is currently a placeholder.
